title: Tesla, Take-Two and Exxon are among the exceptions to this big problem for stock prices
text: Over the long haul, stock prices are pushed higher by steady increases in estimates for companies' sales and earnings. But this process has been reversed recently for many sectors and scores of companies — since June 30, consensus 12-month sales estimates have been cut for 172 companies in the S&P 500.

title: Take-Two stock falls as company says leaked 'Grand Theft Auto' footage the result of 'network intrusion'
text: After leaked footage said to be from a forthcoming "Grand Theft Auto" game appeared online over the weekend, Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. TTWO, -1.72% said in a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission Monday morning that the actions were a result of an intrusion into its network. Rockstar Games, the "Grand Theft Auto" publisher that's part of Take-Two, "experienced a network intrusion in which an unauthorized third party illegally accessed and downloaded confidential information from its systems, including early development footage for the next Grand Theft Auto," per the filing.

title: Zynga Completes Acquisition of Mobile Growth Platform Storemaven

(NASDAQ: TTWO) and a global leader in interactive entertainment, today announced it has completed the acquisition of Storemaven, a world leader in mobile growth and App Store Optimization (ASO) technologies. title: NBA® 2K23 Celebrates the Intersection of Music and Basketball Culture with All-New MyCAREER Experience and J. Cole GameStop Exclusive DREAMER Edition Cover for PS5 and Xbox X|S
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--2K today revealed details about the all-new MyCAREER experience in NBA® 2K23 on Next Gen that includes the largest and most involved storyline in franchise history. The story kicks off after the NBA Draft and challenges players to balance their performance in the NBA, while navigating their off-court career through music, fashion, and business.
